categories.name: General Contracting
categories.description: Full-service general contractors managing all aspects of construction projects from start to finish.

categories.name: Residential Construction
categories.description: Builders specializing in custom homes, production homes, and residential developments.

categories.name: Commercial Construction
categories.description: Construction companies focused on office buildings, retail spaces, and commercial developments.

categories.name: Industrial Construction
categories.description: Specialized contractors for manufacturing facilities, warehouses, and industrial complexes.

categories.name: Renovation & Remodeling
categories.description: Experts in transforming existing spaces through renovations, remodels, and restorations.

categories.name: Electrical Services
categories.description: Licensed electricians providing installation, repair, and maintenance services.

categories.name: Plumbing Services
categories.description: Professional plumbers handling installations, repairs, and maintenance for all plumbing needs.

categories.name: HVAC Services
categories.description: Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning experts for installation and maintenance.

categories.name: Roofing Services
categories.description: Roofing contractors specializing in installation, repair, and replacement services.

categories.name: Concrete & Masonry
categories.description: Specialists in concrete work, foundations, brick, stone, and masonry construction.

categories.name: Painting & Finishing
categories.description: Professional painters and finishers for interior and exterior projects.

categories.name: Landscaping & Outdoor
categories.description: Landscape designers and contractors creating beautiful outdoor spaces.

categories.name: Specialty Contracting
categories.description: Niche contractors providing specialized construction services and installations.

categories.name: Design-Build Services
categories.description: Integrated design and construction services for streamlined project delivery.

categories.name: Green Building & Sustainability
categories.description: Environmentally conscious builders specializing in sustainable and energy-efficient construction.
